hooks.prompt:
Before finishing, do two things:

1. **Code Review** — Review all files created or edited in this task following the rules in .claude/docs/optimizer.md. Begin with '🔍 Optimizer running...' then show findings. If everything looks clean, say '✅ Looks good' in one line.

2. **Agent Update Check** — Follow the detection rules in .claude/docs/agent-updater.md to determine if any agent documentation needs updating. If updates are needed, begin with '📋 Agent Updater running...' then list findings and ask for approval. If nothing needs updating, say nothing about this step.
